prompt: Edit image 1: Segment the elephant instance. Modify its pose to mimic the 'See No Evil' gesture from image 2, having it cover its eyes. Apply the grayscale mask shape from image 3 as a visual effect layered over the segmented elephant instance.

Superimpose the grayscale mask shape from image 3 as a visual effect directly over the segmented elephant instance.
objects: grayscale mask shape (from image 3) covering the elephant's eyes
